issue.title: [Task]: Add bridge writeback
issue.body:
### Work Type

Feature

### Problem / Goal

Make Blueprint write labels and comments for incomplete issues.

### Context

This validates the first GitHub App write-back path.

### Expected Outcome

Incomplete issues receive a clear bot comment.

### Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. Open an issue without acceptance criteria.
2. Trigger Blueprint validation.

### Priority

P2 - normal

### Requester / Owner

@frankyxhl
